zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Aylesbury於1404年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Thomas Aylesbury35歲，母親Lady Katherine Pabenham32歲。她與Thomas Chaworth在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年在她的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾勞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Aylesbury于1404年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Thomas Aylesbury35岁，母亲Lady Katherine Pabenham32岁。她与Thomas Chaworth在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年在她的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾勞德。

nameMeanings.name: Aylesbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aylesbury (Bucks) or possibly Aylesbeare (Devon).

variants.name: Elsbury
meanings: English: habitational name from Aylesbury (Buckinghamshire), from an Old English personal name Ægel (genitive Ægeles, Ægles) + burg ‘fortified place’ (dative byrig).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Aylesbury was born in 1404, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Aylesbury, was 35 and her mother, Lady Katherine Pabenham, was 32. She married Thomas Chaworth in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1458, in her hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Launde, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Aylesbury est née en 1404, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Aylesbury, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Pabenham, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Chaworth à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1458, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Launde, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Aylesbury 1404 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Aylesbury 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Pabenham 32. Sie hat in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Chaworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1458 im Alter von 54 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Launde, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Aylesbury è nata il nel 1404 nel Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Aylesbury, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Pabenham, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Chaworth nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1458, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Launde, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Aylesburyが1404年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Aylesburyは35歳，母Lady Katherine Pabenhamは32歳であった。イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスでThomas Chaworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアラウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Aylesbury(이)가 1404년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Aylesbury(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Pabenham(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 Thomas Chaworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 로드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Aylesbury nasceu em 1404, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Aylesbury, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Pabenham, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Chaworth em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1458, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Launde, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ro.Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England: Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Aylesbury родилась в 1404 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Aylesbury было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Pabenham, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Chaworth в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1458 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности лаунд, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Aylesbury nació en 1404, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Aylesbury, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Pabenham, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Thomas Chaworth en Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1458, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Launde, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
